title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese presents four Claude Code projects: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche-specific command center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an internal operating system that integrates them. The video promotes BuildPartner, a tool for building 10x faster with Claude Code, and positions these projects as practical alternatives to generic tutorials.
